{{Quote|The privateers are flying specially modified ''Millennium Hawk''s…they can outperform most regulation Imperial fighters!|A [[TIE pilot]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], to Grand Moff Wilhuff Tarkin|<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />}}
The '''''Millennium Hawk''''' was a model of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufactured by [[Millennium Astro-Engineering]]. They were popular among criminals in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Gentlemen, what you see before you is a profile of the ''Millennium Hawk''. A basic model with a proven record of performance and reliability…|Zoltan Starkid, to an Imperial delegation|<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />}}
A small, spear-headed [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''Millennium Hawk'' had a large central power core flanked by a pair of [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drives]].<ref name="Millennium Hawk" /> It was a basic model with a proven record of performance and reliability.<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />

==History==
{{Quote|We need something small, fast, and hard-hitting! Something to outrun the ''Hawk''!|Wilhuff Tarkin, to Zoltan Starkid|<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />}}
Manufactured by [[Millennium Astro-Engineering]] at their [[Millennium Astro-Engineering plant|plant]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tharkos]],<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" /> the ''Millennium Hawk'' was popular among [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and criminals that hounded the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="Millennium Hawk" /> during the early [[Standard year|years]]<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" /> of its expansion across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Millennium Hawk" /> These [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] flew specially modified ''Hawks'' that could outperform most regulation Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]], including the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]]. Millennium's next delevopment was the [[Millennium fighter|''Millennium'' fighter]], a larger and slower craft capable of carrying greater paloads.<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
Intending to stamp out contraband traffic, [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] arranged an official visit to the Millennium Astro-Engineering plant to buy a small, fast, and hard-hitting ship that could outrun the ''Millennium Hawk''. A [[Standard week/Legends|week]] later, Tarkin and an Imperial delegation arrived at the plant, where its direct and chief salesman [[Zoltan Starkid]] presented them with the ''Millennium'' fighter, which the Grand Moff immediately dismissed. Alternatively, Starkid presented them with Millennium's latest prototype, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], which exactly suited Tarkin's requirements, complete with unique [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] capability. The Grand Moff purchased it, intending for Imperial [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] to modify it before sending it back to Millennium for production.<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" />
{{Noncanonend}}
